title: rubus plicatus var. stipularis
intro: Rubus plicatus var. stipularis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus plicatus plant, which is a type of bramble or wild raspberry. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus plicatus var. stipularis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus plicatus var. stipularis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
